name: Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department: Incentive/Award of Prizes-For Each Subjects
details: The scheme “Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department: Incentive/Award of Prizes-For Each Subjects” by the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department, Tamil Nadu, provides financial incentives to promote academic achievement among students from underprivileged communities. One Student each from Adi Dravidar/Tribal/Adi Dravider converted to Christianity for each subject is selected for the awards. ﻿ ﻿
eligibility_text: The beneficiary should be a Student. The beneficiary should be a resident of Tamil Nadu. The beneficiary should belong to the Adi Dravidar/Tribal/Adi Dravidar converted to Christianity community. The beneficiary must have passed the 10th or Plus 2 examination.

eligibility_criteria.criterion: Must be a resident of Tamil Nadu

application_url: Step 1: The interested applicant should collect the application form from the office of the District Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Officer. Step 2: In the application form, fill in all the mandatory
